text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper is real and well-documented. Its actual title is "Multimodal Deep Learning" (not "Multi-modal deep learning"), authored by Jiquan Ngiam, Aditya Khosla, Mingyu Kim, Juhan Nam, Honglak Lee, and Andrew Y. Ng, published at ICML 2011 — exactly matching the cited authors and venue. The minor title hyphenation difference ("Multi-modal" vs. "Multimodal") is a trivial formatting variant.
LINK: https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.5555/3104482.3104569
